training_examples.scenario: Component exists but not in render tree

input.user_report: Fixed CommentForm but still getting zero console output when interacting

input.claude_assumption: Fixing CommentForm will fix user interaction

investigation_steps: Check if CommentForm is actually rendered in RealSocialMediaFeed
Trace user interaction elements to source components

red_flags: User reports 'zero console output' after component fixes
Component exists and was modified but behavior unchanged
Tests pass but live UI doesn't reflect changes
Console logs in fixed components don't appear in browser
investigation_triggers: No user feedback improvement after component fixes
Discrepancy between test results and user experience
Component modifications don't affect browser behavior

component_ui_mapping_failure.definition: Fixed component exists in codebase but is not part of actual user interaction flow

correct_component_identification.step_1: Trace from App.tsx through route to find actual rendered component
correct_component_identification.step_2: Identify which component handles the specific user interaction
correct_component_identification.step_3: Check for inline vs componentized implementations
correct_component_identification.step_4: Verify component is in DOM tree using browser dev tools

validation_before_fixing.browser_verification: Open actual app and inspect elements user interacts with
validation_before_fixing.console_testing: Add temporary console.log to verify component is executed

neural_network_features.description: Analyze import statements vs actual component usage in render methods
Correlate user reports with component modification effectiveness
Map actual DOM structure to component assumptions
Detect when inline implementations override componentized versions

training_objectives: Prevent fixing components that aren't in actual user interaction paths
Improve component discovery accuracy before applying fixes
Reduce false positive fix claims when actual UI unchanged
Build better mapping between codebase structure and live UI

improvement_targets.reduce_false_positives: Target < 0.3 false positive rate for component fixes
improvement_targets.improve_user_correlation: Target > 0.8 correlation between fixes and user satisfaction
improvement_targets.increase_identification_accuracy: Target > 0.9 precision for identifying correct UI components
